$comment: Declarative spec of the Cloudflare API token used by .github/workflows/infra.yml
This file is the source of truth for what the token can do.
- infra/scripts/mint-infra-token.sh reads it to create/rotate the token.
- infra/scripts/inspect-token.sh reads it to diff against live Cloudflare state.
Editing the permissions here + re-running mint is how you add/remove scopes.
Never click through the dashboard — the dashboard selection is ephemeral,
this file is not. See infra/README.md §Token-as-code.
name: all-the-blame-infra
$ttl_comment: null = no expiry. Revoke manually in the dashboard if needed.

permissions.name: Workers R2 Storage Write
permissions.why: R2 bucket CRUD (pulumi-state, previews), managed domain, CORS, /r2/temp-access-credentials

permissions.name: Workers KV Storage Write
permissions.why: Write per-PR SHA pointers to the preview-pointers KV namespace from CI
